import * as core from "../core/index.js"; import * as schemas from "./schemas.js"; // @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__ export function string(params) { return core._coercedString(schemas.ZodMiniString, params); } // @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__ export function number(params) { return core._coercedNumber(schemas.ZodMiniNumber, params); } // @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__ export function boolean(params) { return core._coercedBoolean(schemas.ZodMiniBoolean, params); } // @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__ export function bigint(params) { return core._coercedBigint(schemas.ZodMiniBigInt, params); } // @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__ export function date(params) { return core._coercedDate(schemas.ZodMiniDate, params); }
